retrieved_result: The Average size for a dance studio The Average size for a dance studio The average size for a dance studio is 1000 square feet. I am currently in the progress of making a model to show this. It would be roughly ten deep ends of a pool wide and long. That is roughly the same as half a volleyball court. Posted by dance lover at 7:02 PM
